content: Vou implementar as funções manipuladoras para gerenciar o estado e persistência dos questionários customizados em `CompanyDashboard.tsx`.
thinking:
**Focusing on Results Implementation**

Ótimo! I'm now zeroing in on the Results panel implementation within `CompanyDashboard.tsx` (lines 4233-4359). I am re-writing the `activeTab === 'Resultados'` section, specifically aiming to render a slick, modern sub-navigation. The plan involves three key "pill" options: "Relatórios de Candidatos" (results).


**Implementing Candidate Reports**

I'm now diving into the implementation of the "Relatórios de Candidatos" sub-tab. I'm focusing on processing candidate applications to extract test statuses for each candidate. Similar to Kanban, I'll parse `app.candidate_phone` from `companyApplications` to determine `discStatus`, `mbtiStatus`, `questionsStatus`, `temperamentosStatus`, and `customTestStatus`. The goal is to present this data in an elegant table. Buttons or badges will lead to respective modal reports for completed tests.


**Expanding Results Capabilities**

I'm now expanding the results panel to include a "Guia de Testes" sub-tab with detailed descriptions of each test type: DISC, MBTI, Mapeamento de Perfil, and Temperamentos. Next, I'm tackling the "Criar Questionário Customizado" sub-tab, including a modern form layout with a dropdown for job selection, dynamic question addition (single and multiple choice), and saving functionality to update the job description with custom questions.


**Refining Results Panel Structure**

I'm now iterating on the candidate reports section, aiming to create a robust and improved structure. I plan to use the original code from lines 4241 to 4356 as a foundation, but I'm enhancing it to handle all test types. I will replace the current component render with a sub-tabbed navigation using a modern "glassmorphism" style. I'll implement three sub-tabs: Candidate Reports, Test Guide, and Create Custom Questionnaire.


**Refining Candidate Filtering**

I'm now refining the candidate filtering logic within the 'relatorios' sub-tab. I'm focusing on displaying only candidates with initiated or completed tests. This eliminates clutter and highlights active test progress. For each candidate, I'll show their name, job, and test statuses (DISC, MBTI, Mapeamento, Temperamentos, Custom). Statuses will be indicated as completed (with a view button), pending, or not requested.


**Parsing Test Statuses**

I'm now deep in the logic for parsing test statuses (DISC, MBTI, Questions, Temperamentos, Custom) from the application data. I'm extracting and handling 'PENDING' and 'COMPLETED' states for each test type, and importantly, I'm parsing the data from completed tests using `JSON.parse` with try/catch blocks for data integrity. The focus is on displaying only candidates with tests started/completed. If no tests exist, I will gracefully display a feedback card.


**Defining Test Type Guides**

I'm now detailing the test type descriptions for the "Test Guide" sub-tab. I'm focusing on providing concise explanations for each: DISC (Behavioral Profile), MBTI (Personality Type), Profile Mapping, and Temperaments. My goal is to clearly explain the value of each test. I'll also outline the functionality for the "Create" sub-tab, which will be the interactive questionnaire editor.


**Planning Custom Question Editor**

I'm now deep in the design phase for the "Create Custom Questionnaire" editor. I'm focusing on the UI/UX, defining the structure to create and manage custom questions within a job description. I'm planning to implement dynamic question addition, removal, and editing, and will store the data in JSON format within the job description field in Supabase.


**Refining Editor Functionality**

I'm now implementing the custom questionnaire editor's core logic and state management. I've defined methods to add and remove questions of different types (text or choice), as well as update question texts and multiple-choice options. I have also implemented state updates for various user interactions. I'm focusing on ensuring these methods correctly update the `customQuestions` state, in preparation for the integration with Supabase.

args.Description: "Adiciona funções manipuladoras de questionários customizados em CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Adicionar funções auxiliares para manipulação de perguntas customizadas (add, remove, update) e salvamento no Supabase."
args.toolAction: "Adding functions for custom questionnaire management to CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.toolSummary: "Add custom questionnaire management handlers to CompanyDashboard.tsx"
